name: llm-wiki
description: Personal knowledge base powered by LLMs. Claude Code as the engine, Obsidian as the viewer.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n astro,starlight -c cyan,yellow "pnpm --dir sites/landing dev --port 4321" "pnpm --dir sites/docs dev --port 4322"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:site && pnpm run build:docs
scripts.docs:prod: pnpm run build:docs && pnpm --dir sites/docs preview --port 4322
scripts.preview: concurrently -n astro,starlight,open -c cyan,yellow,green "pnpm --dir sites/landing dev --port 4321" "pnpm --dir sites/docs dev --port 4322" "sleep 3 && open http://localhost:4321/llm-wiki/"
scripts.install:all: pnpm --dir sites/landing install && pnpm --dir sites/docs install
